expectations.text: Identifies the NOT IN + NULL trap (empty result if subquery yields a NULL)
expectations.evidence: Issue 1 (critical): rewrites x NOT IN (a,b,NULL), 'returns no rows at all silently'

expectations.text: Recommends NOT EXISTS (or an equivalent NULL-safe construct)
expectations.evidence: NOT EXISTS recommended; plus IS NOT NULL guard and anti-join alternatives

expectations.text: Does NOT treat SELECT * or a missing date filter as a real performance problem here, acknowledging the table is small/static (context overrides the rule)
expectations.evidence: 'Performance: Not a concern. At ~80 rows the table is effectively static'; SELECT * 'harmless for a config table'
